understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating the grid while avoiding spikes; levels restart on failure with 2 attempts and 50 turns each.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT triggers automatic falling in current gravity (DOWN/UP) until landing on solid tiles or hazards; CLICK removes breakable/clickable tiles (x); UNDO reverts actions; left/right_landing previews show post-fall positions and passages; spikes end run immediately.
